scripts.fix:check: bun run --if-present --parallel --filter '*' fix:check && bun run lint:tooling
scripts.format:check: bun run --if-present --parallel --filter '*' format:check && bun run format:check:root
scripts.format:check:root: prettier --check README.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md GEMINI.md CONTRIBUTING.md eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts scripts/build.ts scripts/test-build.ts tests/browser-smoke/auth-flow.spec.ts apps/frontend/vite.config.ts apps/frontend/vitest.config.ts apps/shared/vitest.config.ts apps/api/tests/**/*.ts apps/frontend/tests/**/*.{ts,tsx} apps/shared/tests/**/*.ts docs/**/*.md
scripts.format:root: prettier --write README.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md GEMINI.md CONTRIBUTING.md eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts scripts/build.ts scripts/test-build.ts tests/browser-smoke/auth-flow.spec.ts apps/frontend/vite.config.ts apps/frontend/vitest.config.ts apps/shared/vitest.config.ts apps/api/tests/**/*.ts apps/frontend/tests/**/*.{ts,tsx} apps/shared/tests/**/*.ts docs/**/*.md
scripts.lint: bun run --parallel --filter '*' lint && bun run lint:tooling
scripts.lint:tooling: eslint eslint.config.js playwright.config.ts scripts/build.ts scripts/test-build.ts tests/browser-smoke/auth-flow.spec.ts apps/frontend/vite.config.ts apps/frontend/vitest.config.ts apps/shared/vitest.config.ts --max-warnings 0
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run test:coverage && bun run build
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.dist-clean: bun run clean && rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules
